case_title: SIMON LI-ARTS VS. BENJAMIN LIN et al

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LI-ARTS, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, BENJAMIN HAWK BB, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI-ARTS, SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, BENJAMIN HAWK BB, LLC $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,575.00, THE DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF $5500.00 WITHIN 60 DAYS FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FROM THE PREVIOUS MEDIATION IS HEREBY VACATED. JUDGMENT AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI-ARTS, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, BENJAMIN HAWK BB, LLC
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, BENJAMIN HAWK BB, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-04-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPEARED, AND WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS TO ALLOW SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LI-ARTS, SIMON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILLIP HWEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF FILING OF CHAPTER 7 AT THE UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT.
